author: śrī⋅bilvamaṅgala ṭhākura
verses:
śrī⋅kṛṣṇa viṣṇo madhukaiṭabhāre
bhaktānukampita bhagavan murāre
trāyasva māṁ keśava lokanātha
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

gopāla vaṁśīdhara rūpasindho
lokeśa nārāyaṇa dīnabandho
uccasvaraistvaṁ vada sarvadaiva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

jihve rasajñe madhurapriyā tvaṁ
satyaṁ hitaṁ tvāṁ paramaṁ vadāmi
āvarṇayethā madhurākṣarāṇi
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

govinda govinda hare murāre
govinda govinda mukunda kṛṣṇa
govinda govinda rathāṅgapāṇe
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

śrī⋅kṛṣṇa rādhāvara gokuleśa
gopāla govardhana⋅nātha viṣṇo
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

śrīnātha viśveśvara viśva⋅mūrte
śrī⋅devakī⋅nandana daityaśatro
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

gopī⋅pate kaṁsaripo mukunda
lakṣmī⋅pate keśava vāsudeva
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

gopī⋅janāhlādakara vrajeśa
gocāraṇāraṇya⋅kṛtapraveśa
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

prāṇeśa viśvambhara kaiṭabhāre
vaikuṇṭha nārāyaṇa cakrapāṇe
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

hare murāre madhusūdanādya
śrī⋅rāma sītāvara rāvaṇāre
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

śrī⋅yādavendrādri⋅dharāmvujākṣa
go⋅gopa⋅gopī⋅sukhadānadakṣa
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

dharābharottāraṇa gopaveṣa
vihāralīlā⋅kṛtabandhu⋅śeṣa
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

vakī⋅vakāghāsura⋅dhenukāre
keśī⋅tṛṇavārta⋅vighātadakṣa
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

śrī⋅jānakī⋅jīvana rāma⋅candra
niśācarāre bharatāgrajeśa
jihve pivasvāmṛtametadeva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

nārāyaṇānanta hare nṛsiŋha
prahlāda⋅vādhāhara he kṛpālo
jihve pivasvāmṛtam etad eva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

līlā⋅manuṣyākṛti⋅rāma⋅rūpa
pratāpa⋅dāsī⋅kṛta⋅sarva⋅bhūpa
jihve pivasvāmṛtam etad eva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

śrī⋅kṛṣṇa govinda hare murāre
he nātha nārāyaṇa vāsudeva
jihve pivasvāmṛtam etad eva
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

jihve sadaivaṁ bhaja sundararāṇi
nāmāni kṛṣṇasya manoharāṇi
samasta bhaktārti⋅vināśanāni
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

tvameva jāce mama dehi jihve
samāgate daṇḍadhare kṛtānte
vaktavyamevaṁ madhuraṁ subhaktyā
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti

sukhāvasāne tvidameva sāraṁ
duḥkhāvasāne dvidameva geyam
dehāvasāne tvidameva jāpyaṁ
govinda dāmodara mādhaveti
en_translation:
Śrī Kṛṣṇa, Viṣṇu, enemy of Madhu and Kaiṭabha, O Supreme Lord Murāri, who is compassionate to the devotees, protect me, O Keśava, O Lord of the worlds, O Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O Gopāla, O holder of the flute, O ocean of beauty, O Lord of the universe, O Nārāyaṇa, O friend of the poor, always chant with a loud voice: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O tongue, knower of taste, you are fond of sweetness, I tell you the supreme truth for your benefit, please chant these sweet syllables: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

Govinda, Govinda, Hare, Murāri! Govinda, Govinda, Mukunda, Kṛṣṇa! Govinda, Govinda, holder of the chariot wheel! Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

Śrī Kṛṣṇa, beloved of Rādhā, Lord of Gokula, O Gopāla, O Lord of Govardhana Hill, O Viṣṇu, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O Master of the Goddess of Fortune, O Lord of the universe, O form of the universe, O Son of Devakī, O enemy of the demons, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O Lord of the gopīs, O enemy of Kaṁsa, O Mukunda, O Lord of Lakṣmī, O Keśava, O Vāsudeva, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O delighter of the gopīs, O King of Vraja, You who entered the forest to graze the cows, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O Lord of my life, O maintainer of the universe, O enemy of Kaiṭabha, O Vaikuṇṭha, O Nārāyaṇa, O holder of the discus, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

Hare, Murāri, Madhusūdana, the Primeval One, Śrī Rāma, beloved of Sītā, enemy of Rāvaṇa, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O King of the Yādavas, O lifter of the hill, O lotus-eyed one, expert in giving happiness to the cows, gopas, and gopīs, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O reliever of the earth's burden, clad in the dress of a cowherd, who performs pastimes with friends and Śeṣa, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O enemy of Pūtanā, Baka, Aghāsura, and Dhenuka, expert in destroying Keśī and Tṛṇāvarta, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O life of Jānakī, Rāmacandra, enemy of the demons, O elder brother of Bharata, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O Nārāyaṇa, O Ananta, O Hare, O Nṛsiṁha, remover of Prahlāda's pain, O merciful one, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O Lord who accepts a human-like form for pastimes as Rāma, who made all kings Your servants by Your power, O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

Śrī Kṛṣṇa, Govinda, Hare, Murāri! O Master, Nārāyaṇa, Vāsudeva! O tongue, drink this very nectar: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

O tongue, always worship the beautiful and captivating names of Kṛṣṇa, which destroy the suffering of all devotees: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

I beg you alone, O tongue, please grant me this: when the God of Death arrives, this sweet name must be spoken with great devotion: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!

At the end of happiness, this alone is the essence, at the end of sorrow, this alone is to be sung, at the end of life, this alone is to be chanted: Govinda, Dāmodara, Mādhava!
